Confluence 7.13.description: OGNL Injection Remote Code Execution in Confluence Server and Data Center.
Confluence 7.13.impact: Remote code execution and authentication bypass risk for internet-exposed instances.

Confluence 7.13.7.description: Authentication bypass and privilege escalation in Confluence Server and Data Center.
Confluence 7.13.7.impact: Attackers may gain administrative access through vulnerable endpoints.

Exchange 2019.description: ProxyLogon chain affecting Microsoft Exchange Server.
Exchange 2019.impact: Remote code execution and mailbox compromise on vulnerable Exchange servers.

Exchange 2019 CU12.description: Privilege escalation and Outlook-related vulnerability affecting Microsoft Exchange environments.
Exchange 2019 CU12.impact: May allow unauthorized access to sensitive mail and configuration data.

FortiGate 7.2.0.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in FortiOS SSL-VPN.
FortiGate 7.2.0.impact: Unauthenticated remote code execution risk on internet-facing VPN gateways.

Ivanti Connect Secure 22.7R2.3.description: Authentication bypass and command injection affecting Ivanti Connect Secure.
Ivanti Connect Secure 22.7R2.3.impact: Commonly chained for initial access to remote access infrastructure.

Apache Log4j 2.14.1.description: Remote code execution vulnerability in Apache Log4j 2.
Apache Log4j 2.14.1.impact: Widely exploited for remote code execution in Java applications.
